'''鈭歫-f-f-h''' ('''kajafehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isomerise|isomerise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-f-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isomerise|isomerise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-f-f-h
|-
! Lemma
| kajafehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijafehoko|thijafehoko]] || [[word:jijafehoko|jijafehoko]] || [[word:shijafehoko|shijafehoko]] || [[word:kijafehoko|kijafehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujafehoko|thuthujafehoko]] || [[word:jujujafehoko|jujujafehoko]] || [[word:shushujafehoko|shushujafehoko]] || [[word:kukujafehoko|kukujafehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujafehoko|thujafehoko]] || [[word:jujafehoko|jujafehoko]] || [[word:shujafehoko|shujafehoko]] || [[word:kujafehoko|kujafehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujafehoko|thujafehoko]] || [[word:jujafehoko|jujafehoko]] || [[word:shujafehoko|shujafehoko]] || [[word:kujafehoko|kujafehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejafehoko|thejafehoko]] || [[word:jejafehoko|jejafehoko]] || [[word:shejafehoko|shejafehoko]] || [[word:kejafehoko|kejafehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojafehoko|thothojafehoko]] || [[word:jojojafehoko|jojojafehoko]] || [[word:shoshojafehoko|shoshojafehoko]] || [[word:kokojafehoko|kokojafehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojafehoko|thojafehoko]] || [[word:jojafehoko|jojafehoko]] || [[word:shojafehoko|shojafehoko]] || [[word:kojafehoko|kojafehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojafehoko|thojafehoko]] || [[word:jojafehoko|jojafehoko]] || [[word:shojafehoko|shojafehoko]] || [[word:kojafehoko|kojafehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jafehoko|th忙jafehoko]] || [[word:j忙jafehoko|j忙jafehoko]] || [[word:sh忙jafehoko|sh忙jafehoko]] || [[word:k忙jafehoko|k忙jafehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajafehoko|thathajafehoko]] || [[word:jajajafehoko|jajajafehoko]] || [[word:shashajafehoko|shashajafehoko]] || [[word:kakajafehoko|kakajafehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajafehoko|thajafehoko]] || [[word:jajafehoko|jajafehoko]] || [[word:shajafehoko|shajafehoko]] || [[word:kajafehoko|kajafehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajafehoko|thajafehoko]] || [[word:jajafehoko|jajafehoko]] || [[word:shajafehoko|shajafehoko]] || [[word:kajafehoko|kajafehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
